channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Dolphins and Vikings finish 1-2 in NFLPA report cards for the second straight year
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Miami Dolphins are the top-ranked team, followed by the Minnesota Vikings, for the second consecutive season in the NFL Players Association report card.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Blackhawks fall in Utah, drop 4th straight as rough February nears end
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — There are at least two good things about the month of February for the Blackhawks: That it's almost over and that they didn't play for half of it. Because when they've been on the ice, it hasn't been a good month.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Lando Norris is fastest and Lewis Hamilton 13th as a power cut disrupts F1 testing
item.description: SAKHIR, Bahrain (AP) — Lando Norris was fastest and seven-time champion Lewis Hamilton 13th as Formula 1 teams had to deal with a power outage that disrupted preseason testing Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: New Orleans Privateers players' suspensions related to possible NCAA violations, AP source says
item.description: Four New Orleans players who’ve been suspended since late January are under investigation for possible NCAA violations related to sports gambling, a person familiar with the situation said.
item.dc:creator: Brett Martel, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Rae Burrell and Dearica Hamby hope time together on Unrivaled team will carry over to LA Sparks
item.description: Los Angeles Sparks teammates Rae Burrell and Dearica Hamby are getting the chance to further build their chemistry on and off the court this offseason as they play together at Unrivaled.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Luka Doncic's Mavericks reunion was 'so weird.' He still gets a triple-double and a W for the Lakers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Although Luka Doncic speaks four languages, he struggled for the words to express just how strange it was to play against the Dallas Mavericks on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Travis Hunter already has coaches and executives convinced he can be two-way player in NFL
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Travis Hunter arrived at the NFL's annual scouting combine with a Heisman Trophy resume, an invitation to work out at two positions and ready to answer all doubters.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Mahomes' barber reveals story behind star quarterback's viral haircut
item.description: Patrick Mahomes' longtime barber told Fox News Digital about why the quarterback opted for such a different hairstyle and how it almost happened sooner.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bengals plan to make All-Pro receiver Ja'Marr Chase the NFL's highest-paid non-quarterback
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Cincinnati Bengals plan to make All-Pro wide receiver Ja’Marr Chase the highest-paid non-quarterback in the NFL. “He is going to end up being the No. 1 paid non-quarterback in the league,” director of player personnel Duke Tobin said Tuesday at the NFL scouting combine.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Girls Softball: Christian 5, El Capitan 3
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Spring sports underway with Christian beating El Capitan on Monday afternoon 5-3. Eagles were lead by Ava Barrios, Long Beach State commit was dominate in the circle going five innings with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: 28-year-old freshman at MiraCosta makes name as hoops star
item.description: SAN DIEGO (FOX 5/KUSI) — It might not look like it, but Ramel Bethea is old for a freshman — 28 years old to be exact. “Yea the age crazy," said Bethea, who is playing his first season of college basketball at MiraCosta College.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz late comeback falls short against Portland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Anfernee Simons had 28 points and out six assists to lead the Portland Trail Blazers to a 114-112 victory over the Utah Jazz on Monday night. Keyonte George, who scored 21 points, missed a 25-foot three-pointer at the buzzer that would have won the game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Giddey scores 25 points as the Bulls snap a 6-game skid with a 142-110 rout of the 76ers
item.description: Josh Giddey had 25 points, 16 rebounds and six assists as the Chicago Bulls ended a six-game skid by routing the Philadelphia 76ers 142-110 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Guenther scores game-winner in 2-1 victory over Vancouver
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Dylan Guenther scored the tiebreaking goal with 5:53 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Vancouver Canucks 2-1 at Delta Center on Sunday. Guenther scored on the power play by tipping in a backdoor pass from Nick Schmaltz at the left post.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah's comeback effort falls short at UCF, 76-72
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (ABC4 Sports) - Darius Johnson scored a reverse layup with 2.5 seconds left to give UCF the lead and Keyshawn Hall added two free throws after a turnover as the Knights knocked off Utah, 76-72 Sunday to snap a seven-game losing streak and earn their first win in a month.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Sky acquire 2-time All-Star Atkins from Washington Mystics for 2025 No. 3 pick
item.description: The Chicago Sky have traded their top pick in the upcoming WNBA draft for two-time All-Star guard Ariel Atkins from the Washington Mystics.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Match preview: San Diego FC set to make historic MLS debut against LA Galaxy
item.description: San Diego FC is set to take the field on Sunday for the first time in Major League Soccer, facing off against the reigning MLS Cup champions, LA Galaxy, at Dignity Health Sports Park -- a history making match.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Luxury portable toilets sought after ahead of NFL draft
item.description: The luxury restroom trailers and containers feature flushing toilets, sinks, air conditioning, and even stereo systems.
item.dc:creator: Timothy Littau, NewsNation

item.title: University of Arizona apologizes for offensive chants aimed at BYU basketball team
item.description: The University of Arizona Athletics Department is apologizing after a derogatory chant aimed at BYU players ensued at a men's basketball game Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin gets historic 100th World Cup race win and ties record for most podiums
item.description: Shiffrin’s record-extending 100th career World Cup race win Sunday fulfilled a quest put on hold by a serious crash in November.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Girls Water Polo: Rancho Bernardo 8, Patrick Henry 7
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-CIF Girls Water Polo Division One title game Rancho Bernardo beat Patrick Henry wins a great game in double overtime 8-7.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Utah State sweeps San Diego State, 79-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For just the second time first since joining the Mountain West Conference, Utah State sweeps San Diego State. Dexter Akanno scored a career-high 26 points, making 7-of-9 three-pointers to lead the Aggies to a 79-71 win over the Aztecs Saturday night at The Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Red Rocks clinch Big 12 regular season title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah claimed the Big 12 Conference’s first gymnastics regular-season title. The Red Rocks earned the title Friday after a 198.075-197.525 victory against Denver to go 6-0 during league play.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Singer of Canadian anthem at 4 Nations Face-Off changes lyric to protest Trump's 51st state remarks
item.description: The anthem singer who performed the Canadian anthem prior to the 4 Nations Face-Off championship game Thursday night changed a lyric in “O Canada” as a response to U.S. President Donald Trump's repeated remarks about making the country the 51st state.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO and KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Fruita's Tatum Williams reached the peak of Colorado wrestling with passion and purpose
item.description: Tatum Williams is a champion: "It's a culmination of really what feels like a lifetime's worth of work"
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
